_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Financial Markets Table
_meta.description: The FinancialTable component is a comprehensive data table designed for displaying market indices and financial data with interactive features and smooth animations. It features circular country flag icons, color-coded performance badges, sparkline charts, and responsive grid layout that adapts to different screen sizes while maintaining proper spacing. The component includes hover effects, selection states, and Framer Motion animations for enhanced user experience, making it ideal for financial dashboards, trading platforms, or investment tracking applications where users need to quickly scan and compare market performance data.
